channel.title: Risk Management on Judy AI Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Risk Management on Judy AI Lab

item.title: The Holding Time Effect: Why Your Trades Should Close Fast
item.description: Analysis of 30+ live trades reveals a strong holding time effect: trades closed within 2 hours have 65% win rate, while those exceeding 2 hours drop to 20%.

item.title: When Your Strategy Starts Losing: Three Lines of Adaptive Risk Control
item.description: How real Testnet losses revealed a trend mismatch in our long-only strategy, and the three adaptive defenses we built: performance cooldown, EMA trend filter, and Market Regime detection.

item.title: Position Sizing: The Most Underrated Part of Quantitative Trading
item.description: Most traders spend 90% of their time finding signals and 10% thinking about position size. But math shows: the same strategy with different position sizing can produce results that differ by 10x.
